hero.title: Ricardo Tapia
hero.subtitle: Cross-Platform Software Developer
hero.description: I design and build custom software for businesses: ERP, e-commerce, platforms, and web applications.

featured.label: // featured projects
featured.title: Featured projects
featured.subtitle: Public-access work — live sites and repos — you can open right now.

expertise.label: // what I do
expertise.title: I design and build complete software systems
expertise.intro: I own the product end to end — architecture, development, database and deploy — favoring maintainable solutions that solve real business problems.

web.title: Web platforms & SaaS
web.desc: Custom web apps and SaaS products with Next.js and React, from architecture to deploy.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.desc: Online stores with payments, shipping, catalog and a role-based admin panel.

erp.title: ERP & internal systems
erp.desc: Monorepos and operations systems: inventory, CFDI electronic invoicing, sales and production.

mobile.title: Mobile apps
mobile.desc: Offline-first mobile apps with React Native and Expo, with data always available.

work.title: Work
work.subtitle: Complete systems in production: ERP, SaaS, e-commerce, and platforms.

about.title: About
about.bio: Full-stack developer based in Chihuahua, Mexico. I build software systems end to end, prioritizing maintainable architectures and product experiences that solve real business problems.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
